message:
feat(render): add target-agnostic render scene IR and backend implementations

Introduce a shared RenderScene intermediate representation in fm-layout
that decouples diagram semantics from renderer-specific output. This
enables both the SVG and Canvas2D backends to consume the same scene
graph, improving consistency and enabling future backends (PDF, terminal)
to reuse the same pipeline.

Key changes:
- fm-layout: add RenderScene, RenderGroup, RenderItem, RenderPath,
  RenderText, and supporting types (FillStyle, StrokeStyle, PathCmd,
  RenderTransform, RenderClip) plus build_render_scene() constructor
- fm-render-canvas: add render_scene_to_canvas() public API and full
  Canvas2dRenderer::render_scene() implementation with group/path/text
  traversal, transform application, and clip support
- fm-render-svg: add SvgBackend enum (LegacyLayout vs Scene), wire
  scene backend through render_svg_with_config(), implement full SVG
  document generation from RenderScene including defs, accessibility,
  CSS themes, and clip paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
